name_en: 【Highest Version Original Factory Leather Top-tier Original with Full Counter Packaging】 🎉 Prada New Nylon Hobo Handbag/Crossbody with Gold Hardware 😘😘 This Hobo bag, which went viral in the fashion circle due to recommendations from influencer groups, has a new design! 👏👏 The design is amazing 👍👍 Multi-functional: waist bag/shoulder bag/crossbody 👍👍 The handle is replaced with a chain, adding a touch of sexiness when used as a shoulder bag. Also comes with a long strap. The best part is the strap has a small charm (mini bag), which can also be used to hang other bags or on the waist as an accessory 🙊🙊 Goes well with any outfit 😘😘 Hurry up and get one, it's so beautiful 🙊🙊 Model: 1BH204, Size: 22x12x6cm
